problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
